text:
The diff touches only `.github/workflows/pr-build.yml`. No Lean source files are changed. The four roadmap targets are all mathematical; none has any CI/infrastructure node. There is no path from a workflow refactor to any roadmap target, and the roadmap has no infrastructure section to reference.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-97471a29290f9bd77db962a8

```json
{
  "verdict": "block",
  "summary": "This PR modifies only the CI workflow and advances no roadmap target. The four roadmap targets (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDEs) are entirely mathematical; none names CI infrastructure as a prerequisite or dependency. The work may be worthwhile, but a human must add a roadmap entry for it first.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "file": ".github/workflows/pr-build.yml",
      "line": 0,
      "issue": "No roadmap target or named prerequisite is cited, and none exists: all four roadmap files (TauCetiRoadmap/*/README.md, Targets.lean) are purely mathematical and contain no CI node. There is no path from this workflow change to any roadmap target.",
      "fix": "A human must add a roadmap entry for CI/build infrastructure before this PR can be accepted through the automated review path.",
      "evidence": "grep -r 'CI\\|workflow\\|sandbox\\|landrun' roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap returns only incidental uses of the word 'build' in mathematical prose. roadmap/README.md lists only four mathematical roadmaps with no infrastructure section."
    }
  ]
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: This PR modifies only the CI workflow and advances no roadmap target. The four roadmap targets (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDEs) are entirely mathematical; none names CI infrastructure as a prerequisite or dependency. The work may be worthwhile, but a human must add a roadmap entry for it first.

findings.issue: No roadmap target or named prerequisite is cited, and none exists: all four roadmap files (TauCetiRoadmap/*/README.md, Targets.lean) are purely mathematical and contain no CI node. There is no path from this workflow change to any roadmap target.
findings.fix: A human must add a roadmap entry for CI/build infrastructure before this PR can be accepted through the automated review path.
findings.evidence: grep -r 'CI\|workflow\|sandbox\|landrun' roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap returns only incidental uses of the word 'build' in mathematical prose. roadmap/README.md lists only four mathematical roadmaps with no infrastructure section.
